title: Manufacturing Engineer - Honda Motorcycle India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Honda Motorcycle India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Honda Motorcycle India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!
